# Template — AI review packet (starter)

**Purpose:** Standard pre-closeout review after implementation and verification attempts.

## Required fields

- Scope reviewed
- Files changed
- What passed (with evidence)
- What is unverified
- Risks or regressions introduced
- Rollback path
- DoD status (met / partial / not met)
- Recommended next step

## Standard packet

```text
=== AI review packet (starter) ===

Scope reviewed:
Files changed:
What passed:
What is unverified:
Risks or regressions introduced:
Rollback path:
DoD status:
Recommended next step:

=== End packet ===
```

## Review rules

- Do not claim "done" without mapped evidence.
- List unverified items explicitly.
- If DoD is partial/not met, route back through intake or follow-up work.
